description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude male figure standing in a dynamic pose, with one arm bent and the other extended, as if in mid-motion. The figure is highly detailed, showing defined musculature and anatomical accuracy, and stands atop a solid, rectangular pedestal with a glossy, dark finish. The facial features are finely sculpted, with the head turned slightly to one side, giving the impression of alertness or readiness. The back view reveals the strong musculature of the shoulders, back, and legs, emphasizing the athletic build of the subject. The pedestal is simple yet elegant, providing a stable base and contrasting visually with the lighter color of the figure. The overall impression is one of classical artistry, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary.
description: A detailed nude male figure in a dynamic pose stands atop a glossy, dark pedestal, showcasing classical sculptural artistry and anatomical precision.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's chest, face, and bent right arm, with the left arm extended and both legs firmly planted on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the figure's profile, muscular torso, and the forward stride of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and legs, with both arms visible and the figure's head turned slightly to the left.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the figure's right arm bent at the elbow and the straight posture of the right leg.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
